title: Rechsteineria macropoda
taxonomy: Rechsteineria macropoda is a genus of fungi in the family Tubeufiaceae. It belongs to the phylum Ascomycota and is a type of anamorphic fungus. The classification of Rechsteineria macropoda is further divided into the class Dothideomycetes and the order Tubeufiales. Within the class Dothideomycetes, it is placed in the subclass Pleosporomycetidae. The family Tubeufiaceae is also a part of the order Tubeufiales.
